allow: Bash(python3 -c "import re,json; h=open\('index.html',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\); b=re.findall\(r'<script type=\\"application/ld\\+json\\">\(.*?\)</script>',h,re.S\); [json.loads\(x\) for x in b]; print\('JSON-LD: all',len\(b\),'valid'\)")
